formulas.formula: =OR($N$32="HaTelit",$K$32="Double 2nd Coat",$K$26="N/A",$N$32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A10",$N$32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A15")

formulas.label: L/m²/mm
formulas.formula:
=IF(AND(N16>=0%,N16<15%,K45="Flat or Downhill",N45="No"),"0",
IF(AND(N16>=0%,N16<15%,K45="Flat or Downhill",N45="Yes"),"-0.01",
IF(AND(N16>=15%,N16<=25%,K45="Flat or Downhill",N45="No"),"-0.01",
IF(AND(N16>=15%,N16<=25%,K45="Flat or Downhill",N45="Yes"),"-0.02",
IF(AND(N16>=26%,N16<=45%,K45="Flat or Downhill",N45="No"),"-0.02",
IF(AND(N16>=26%,N16<=45%,K45="Flat or Downhill",N45="yes"),"-0.03",
IF(AND(N16>=46%,N16<=65%,K45="Flat or Downhill",N45="No"),"-0.03",
IF(AND(N16>=46%,N16<=65%,K45="Flat or Downhill",N45="yes"),"-0.04",
IF(AND(N16>65%,K45="Flat or Downhill",N45="No"),"0",
IF(AND(N16>65%,K45="Flat or Downhill",N45="Yes"),"0",
IF(AND(N16>=0%,N16<15%,K45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",N45="No"),"-0.01",
IF(AND(N16>=0%,N16<15%,K45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",N45="Yes"),"-0.02",
IF(AND(N16>=15%,N16<=25%,K45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",N45="No"),"-0.02",
IF(AND(N16>=15%,N16<=25%,K45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",N45="yes"),"-0.03",
IF(AND(N16>25%,N16<=45%,K45="Flat or Downhill",N45="No"),"-0.02",
IF(AND(N16>25%,N16<=45%,K45="Flat or Downhill",N45="YES"),"-0.03",
IF(AND(N16>25%,N16<=45%,K45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",N45="No"),"-0.04",
IF(AND(N16>25%,N16<=45%,K45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",N45="yes"),"-0.04",
IF(AND(N16>=46%,N16<=65%,K45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",N45="No"),"-0.04",
IF(AND(N16>=46%,N16<=65%,K45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",N45="yes"),"-0.05",
IF(AND(N16>65%,K45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",N45="Yes"),"0",
IF(AND(N16>65%,K45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",N45="no"),"0"))))))))))))))))))))))

formulas.label: L/m²/mm
formulas.formula: =IF(AND(X16>=0%,X16<=15%,U45="Flat or Downhill",X45="No"),"0",IF(AND(X16>=0%,X16<=15%,U45="Flat or Downhill",X45="Yes"),"-0.01",IF(AND(X16>=16%,X16<=25%,U45="Flat or Downhill",X45="No"),"-0.01",IF(AND(X16>=16%,X16<=25%,U45="Flat or Downhill",X45="Yes"),"-0.02",IF(AND(X16>=26%,X16<=45%,U45="Flat or Downhill",X45="No"),"-0.02",IF(AND(X16>=26%,X16<=45%,U45="Flat or Downhill",X45="yes"),"-0.03",IF(AND(X16>=46%,X16<=65%,U45="Flat or Downhill",X45="No"),"-0.03",IF(AND(X16>=46%,X16<=65%,U45="Flat or Downhill",X45="yes"),"-0.04",IF(AND(X16>65%,U45="Flat or Downhill",X45="No"),"0",IF(AND(X16>65%,U45="Flat or Downhill",X45="Yes"),"0",IF(AND(X16>=0%,X16<=15%,U45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",X45="No"),"-0.01",IF(AND(X16>=0%,X16<=15%,U45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",X45="Yes"),"-0.02",IF(AND(X16>=16%,X16<=25%,U45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",X45="No"),"-0.02",IF(AND(X16>=16%,X16<=25%,U45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",X45="yes"),"-0.03",IF(AND(X16>=26%,X16<=45%,U45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",X45="No"),"-0.03",IF(AND(X16>=26%,X16<=45%,U45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",X45="No"),"-0.04",IF(AND(X16>=26%,X16<=45%,U45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",X45="yes"),"-0.04",IF(AND(X16>=46%,X16<=65%,U45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",X45="No"),"-0.04",IF(AND(X16>=46%,X16<=65%,U45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",X45="yes"),"-0.05",IF(AND(X16>65%,U45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",X45="Yes"),"0",IF(AND(X16>65%,U45="Slow moving - Climbing Lanes",X45="no"),"0")))))))))))))))))))))

=IF(OR($N$32="HaTelit",$K$32="Double 2nd Coat",$K$26="N/A",$N$32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A10",$N$32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A15"),
0,
SUMIFS(
LookupsTbl[E_num],
LookupsTbl[KeyA], UPPER(TRIM($K$26)),
LookupsTbl[KeyB], UPPER(TRIM($K$38)),
LookupsTbl[C (Min Sand Patch)], "<=" & N($K$26),
LookupsTbl[D (Max Sand Patch)], ">=" & N($K$26)
))

formulas.label: L/m²
formulas.formula:
=IF(OR($N$32="HaTelit",$K$32="Double 2nd Coat",$K$26="N/A",$N$32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A10",$N$32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A15"),"",
IF(ISNUMBER(MATCH($K$26,{"Granular","Foamed bitumen","Primed","Primer Seal","Bridge deck"},0)),0,
INDEX(LookupsTbl[E (Value)],
MATCH(1,
(LookupsTbl[KeyA]=UPPER(TRIM($K$26)))*
(LookupsTbl[KeyB]=UPPER(TRIM($K$38)))*
(LookupsTbl[C (Min Sand Patch)]<=N($N$26))*
(LookupsTbl[D (Max Sand Patch)]>=N($N$26)),
0))))

formulas.label: L/m131
formulas.formula: =IF(AND(N32="HaTelit",P32="C170"),"Initial Tack Coat Spray Rate",IF(AND(N32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A10",P32="C170"),"Initial Tack Coat Spray Rate",IF(AND(N32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A15",P32="C170"),"Initial Tack Coat Spray Rate","")))

formulas.label: NOT Profiled asphalt
L/m²
formulas.formula:
=IF(AND(N32="waterproofing",P32="S25E",K32="Armour coat",K38="10mm",K26="Bridge deck "),1.5,
IF(AND(N32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A10",P32="C170"),(1-H42)+H33+H36+H37+H38+H39,
IF(AND(N32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A15",P32="C170"),(1.1-H42)+H33+H36+H37+H38+H39,
IF(AND(P32="Emulsion(60%)-Under Asphalt",K38="10mm"),1.2,
IF(AND(P32="Emulsion(≥67%)-Under Asphalt",K38="10mm"),1.1,
IF(AND(P32="Emulsion(60%)-Under Asphalt",K38="5 & 7mm"),1,
IF(AND(P32="Emulsion(≥67%)-Under Asphalt",K38="5 & 7mm"),0.9,
IF(ISNUMBER(SEARCH("67%",P32)),SUM(H33:H39)/0.67,
IF(ISNUMBER(SEARCH("60%",P32)),SUM(H33:H39)/0.6,
SUM(H33:H39))))))))))

formulas.label: m2/m3
formulas.formula:
=IF(AND(K38="10mm",OR(P32="Emulsion(60%)-Under Asphalt",P32="Emulsion(≥67%)-Under Asphalt")),
     140,
     IF(AND(K38="5 & 7mm",OR(P32="Emulsion(60%)-Under Asphalt",P32="Emulsion(≥67%)-Under Asphalt")),
        170,
        H45/H27
     )
)

formulas.label: NOTES:
formulas.formula:
=IF(OR(N32="SAM-S",N32="SAM-R"),
  "SAM – preferred SAM is an S/S (14 or 10 mm) but a D/D may be required where there are also high-stress conditions",
  IF(N32="Geotextile",
    "Bond coat application rates typically vary between 0.4 and 0.8 L/m2 depending on surface texture and weather conditions. In warm to hot conditions, the top end of this application rate may lead to excessive application rates and binder pickup.",
    IF(N32="HaTelit",
      "The tack coat for the HaTelit C must be applied at a starting spray rate of:" & CHAR(10) &
      "– 0.45 to 0.55 L/m2 of residual bitumen on brand new (warm) asphalt surfaces;" & CHAR(10) &
      "– 0.45 to 0.55 L/m2 of residual bitumen on asphalt surfaces that have not been cold planed;" & CHAR(10) &
      "– 0.55 to 0.65 L/m2 of residual bitumen on asphalt surfaces that have been cold planed.",
      IF(N32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A10",
        "Bond Coat - 0.5 - 0.7 L/m2, Overall bitumen (including Bond Coat) Residual bitumen - 0.9 - 1.1 L/m2",
        IF(N32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A15",
          "Bond Coat - 0.5 - 0.7 L/m2, Overall bitumen (including Bond Coat) Residual bitumen - 1.0 - 1.2 L/m2",
          ""
        )
      )
    )
  )
)
&
IF(H36="Note 1",IF(OR(N32="SAM-S",N32="SAM-R",N32="Geotextile",N32="HaTelit",N32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A10",N32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A15"),CHAR(10)&CHAR(10),"")&"NOTE 1  Embedment considerations dominant.",
IF(H36="Note 2",IF(OR(N32="SAM-S",N32="SAM-R",N32="Geotextile",N32="HaTelit",N32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A10",N32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A15"),CHAR(10)&CHAR(10),"")&"NOTE 2  Specialised treatments necessary.",
IF(H36="Note 3",IF(OR(N32="SAM-S",N32="SAM-R",N32="Geotextile",N32="HaTelit",N32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A10",N32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A15"),CHAR(10)&CHAR(10),"")&"NOTE 3: This treatment might not be advisable depending on the shape and interlock of aggregates so alternative treatments (surface enrichment, smaller size seal or others) should be considered.",
IF(H36="Note 4",IF(OR(N32="SAM-S",N32="SAM-R",N32="Geotextile",N32="HaTelit",N32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A10",N32="HUESKER Chipseal Grid A15"),CHAR(10)&CHAR(10),"")&"NOTE 4  For application of aggregate sizes greater than 14 mm, adopt allowances applicable to 14 mm aggregate.",""))))

=IF(AND($N$32="HaTelit",$P$32="C170"),
 "Absorption (G40) – Default: MEDIUM." & CHAR(10) &
 "Use LOW for smoother/tight surfaces or warmer conditions (avoid flushing)." & CHAR(10) &
 "Use HIGH for coarser/open texture, colder/windy conditions, or where extra adhesion is desired.",
 "")
